source_evidence.snippet: NETGEAR KB 000059633 describes a computer-side TFTP client uploading firmware to a NETGEAR router and lists R7000 in its applies-to section.
source_evidence.notes: Supports R7000 model applicability and passive TFTP direction; does not resolve hardware or firmware scope.

source_evidence.snippet: NETGEAR KB 000064624 provides Apple macOS TFTP client firmware upload guidance and lists R7000 in its applies-to section.
source_evidence.notes: Supports macOS workflow and passive TFTP direction; does not resolve hardware or firmware scope.

review_notes: Incoming draft only. Generated after Claude Code Batch 2 review allowed R7000 draft preparation under strict guardrails. Hardware version and firmware version applicability remain unknown; do not promote to reviewed/final without human review and scope decision.
notes: Hardware version and firmware version applicability are unknown. This procedure may not work for all R7000 variants. The app should present this as a human-reviewed draft candidate only until Owner approval.
known_issues: No default IP, subnet, firmware filename, credentials, UART, or web recovery fields are populated because they are not part of this guarded draft.
risk_warnings: Hardware version and firmware version applicability are unknown. This procedure may not work for all R7000 variants.
